prompt: Imagine that you are doing a project on why some Zetlanders refuse to attend music schools . You have found some data on the subject – the results of the opinion polls (see the table below) . ideas: Music schools attract many, but some refuse them
Top reason: no fast result (29%) frustrates impatient learners

Opinion: playing an instrument trains discipline and creativity
Note money barrier (14%): rent or borrow a cheaper instrument

table.q: Why do you refuse to attend a music school?
rows: No money for a quality instrument

prompt: Comment on the following statement. Sports help people to fight stress. What is your opinion? Do you agree with this statement? Write 200 – 250 words . Sport distracts the mind from daily worries and exams
Team sports give social support, reducing loneliness
Opposing view: competition and pressure can add stress
Counter: that is only top-level sport, not casual jogging
Conclusion: regular gentle activity clearly fights stress

Use the following plan: – make an opening statement on the subject of the project; – select and report 2 – 3 facts; – make 1–2 comparisons where relevant; – outline a problem that can arise with keeping pets and suggest a way of solving it; – conclude by giving your opinion on the role of pets in our lives.
ideas: Top: loneliness (44%) — pets mainly fill an emotional gap
Comment: happiness and care reasons show pets give purpose
Compare loneliness (44%) vs stress (8%) — companionship outweighs therapy
Problem: pets need time and money; solution — plan care and budget
Opinion: pets enrich lives with comfort and responsibility
Smartphone diagram: chatting, games, study, video — comment on overuse

prompt: Comment on one of the following statements. Volunteering is essential for teenagers. With the Internet we no longer need TV. What is your opinion? Do you agree with this statement? Write 200 – 250 words . Use the following plan: – make an introduction (state the problem paraphrasing the given statement) – express your personal opinion and give 2 – 3 reasons for your opinion – express an opposing opinion and give 1 – 2 reasons for this opposing opinion – explain why you do not agree with the opposing opinion – make a conclusion restating your position
ideas: Intro: paraphrase — is volunteering a must for teenagers?
Agree: builds empathy, soft skills, and a strong CV
Agree: connects youth with community and real problems
Opposing: studies should come first; volunteering can wait
Rebut: a few hours weekly need not harm grades
Conclude: benefits outweigh costs, so I agree it is essential

prompt: Comment on one of the following statements. Physical Training is the most important school subject. It is better to travel alone. What is your opinion? Do you agree with this statement? Write 200 – 250 words . Use the following plan: – make an introduction (state the problem paraphrasing the given statement) ; – express your personal opinion and give 2 – 3 reasons for your opinion; – express an opposing opinion and give 1 – 2 reasons for this opposing opinion; – explain why you do not agree with the opposing opinion; – make a conclusion restating your position.
ideas: Intro: paraphrase — is PE the most important subject?
Agree: health, energy, and discipline support all learning
Agree: teamwork and stress relief boost wellbeing
Opposing: maths and languages matter more for careers
Rebut: without health, academic success is hard to enjoy
Conclude: PE is vital but I weigh my final position clearly

Agree: trains memory and broadens cultural understanding

prompt: Comment on the following statement. Sport unites people. What is your opinion? Do you agree with this statement? Write 200 – 250 words .
